pkgmetadata.longdescription: Python 3.4 include a WeakMethod class, for storing bound methods using weak references(see the Python weakref module httpdocs.python.orglibraryweakref.html_).This project is a backport of the WeakMethod class, and tests, for Python 2.6. The testsrequire the unittest2 package httppypi.python.orgpypiunittest2_. Github repository issue tracker httpsgithub.comtwang817weakrefmethod
